cis.title: Network Monitoring & Defense
cis.description: Detect and respond to malicious C2 communication
cis.remediation: Isolate endpoint. Block C2 IP at all egress points. Begin forensic investigation.

ai_analysis.summary: Beacon 1/6 from infected host 10.0.0.42 to C2 server 203.0.141.123 [initial check-in]
ai_analysis.one_liner: Beacon 1/6 from infected host 10.0.0.42 to C2 server 203.0.141.123 [initial check-in]
ai_analysis.narrative: Endpoint 10.0.0.42 is beaconing to suspected C2 203.0.141.123 via HTTPS with regular 30s intervals. Payload size consistency (512–768 bytes) matches known RAT/botnet behaviour (MITRE T1071.001, T1573). Host is fully compromised — isolate immediately.
next_steps: Isolate endpoint 10.0.0.42
Block C2 IP at all firewalls
Capture memory dump

recommended_actions: Isolate endpoint 10.0.0.42
Block C2 IP at all firewalls
Capture memory dump
containment_steps: Block C2 IP at DNS and firewall

dashboard.alert_title: Beacon 1/6 from infected host 10.0.0.42 to C2 server 203.0.141.123 [initial check-in]

detection.label: malicious
reasoning: Source IP has no legitimate baseline
